articles.title: Did Dogecoin bottom first? DOGE price poised for 20% gains as whales return
articles.description: Dogecoin whale wallets hit record DOGE holdings as the price rallies 23.5%, strengthening the memecoin’s rally chances in May.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs draw $2B in April for highest monthly inflows this year
articles.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs posted strong April inflows as Bitcoin rallied, with IBIT leading gains despite late-month outflows across funds.

articles.title: Bitcoin ticks higher, but remains range-bound as traders keep short bias
articles.description: BTC rises to $77,000 after holding $75,000 support, but negative funding, unchanged open interest and cautious positioning signal a lack of conviction.

articles.title: Brazil bars crypto settlement in regulated cross-border payment rails
articles.description: Brazil’s central bank barred virtual assets from settlement inside regulated eFX payment rails as it tightens oversight of crypto-linked flows.

articles.title: Bitcoin seals best monthly gain in a year as S&P 500 hits fresh all-time high
articles.description: Bitcoin finished April above $76,000 to preserve most of its monthly gains, but the S&P 500 stole the limelight with a trip back to record highs.

articles.title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments firm Distributed Technologies Research
articles.description: Bakkt announced the deal in January, which was originally for 9.3 million shares, along with a corporate name change to Bakkt Inc.

articles.title: Bithumb scores a legal win in South Korea as six-month suspension is lifted by local judge
articles.description: South Korea's financial watchdog imposed a $24.6 million fine on Bithumb and partial suspension that came into effect last month.

articles.title: Strategy keeps STRC dividend at 11.5% as stock logs first monthly gain in nine

articles.title: Bitcoin risks extended retreat as April rally was futures-driven: CryptoQuant
articles.description: Futures drove up Bitcoin's price in April while spot demand declined, which CryptoQuant warned has historically preceded extended price declines.

articles.title: Bitcoiners launch 'The Bitcoin Evidence Base' to stamp out FUD
articles.description: The Bitcoin FUD-stopping tool cites over 22 peer-reviewed research papers to address common misconceptions about Bitcoin.

articles.title: DeFi protocol Carrot becomes first casualty of $285M Drift exploit
articles.description: Carrot's total value locked has collapsed 93% in a month, from $28 million to $1.99 million, leaving the protocol financially unable to continue.
